title: dryopteris henryi
intro: Dryopteris henryi, also known as Henry's wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris henryi include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
